SUPERAPP FRAMEWORK — LLM REFERENCE
====================================

SuperApp is a TypeScript web framework implementing The Elm Architecture (TEA).
Zero runtime dependencies. Uses Bun as runtime and Vite as bundler.

Package: "superapp" version 0.1.0
Exports: "superapp", "superapp/fx", "superapp/subs", "superapp/router", "superapp/debugger", "superapp/jsx-runtime"

================================================================================
CORE TYPES (superapp)
================================================================================

VNode — Virtual DOM node
  { tag: string | MemoView, props: Record<string, any>, key: string | number | undefined, children: VNode[], type: number, memo: unknown, node: Node | undefined }

MemoView<P> = (props: P) => VNode
Dispatch<Msg> = (msg: Msg | readonly Msg[]) => void
EffectFn<Msg, P> = (dispatch: Dispatch<Msg>, props: P) => void
Effect<Msg> = readonly [EffectFn<Msg, any>, any]
Cmd<Msg> = readonly Effect<Msg>[]
SubFn<Msg, P> = (dispatch: Dispatch<Msg>, props: P) => () => void
Sub<Msg> = readonly [SubFn<Msg, any>, any] | false | null | undefined
UpdateResult<S, Msg> = S | readonly [S, Cmd<Msg>]
Update<S, Msg> = (state: Readonly<S>, msg: Msg) => UpdateResult<S, Msg>
Init<S, Msg> = S | readonly [S, Cmd<Msg>]

AppConfig<S, Msg>:
  init: Init<S, Msg>
  update: Update<S, Msg>
  view: (state: Readonly<S>, dispatch: Dispatch<Msg>) => VNode
  subscriptions?: (state: Readonly<S>) => Sub<Msg>[]
  node: HTMLElement
  debug?: boolean | DebugConfig
  middleware?: (dispatch: Dispatch<Msg>) => Dispatch<Msg>

DebugConfig:
  console?: boolean
  history?: boolean
  maxHistory?: number

AppInstance<S, Msg>:
  dispatch: Dispatch<Msg>
  getState: () => Readonly<S>
  destroy: () => void
  getHistory: () => readonly Readonly<S>[]
  getHistoryIndex: () => number
  goBack: () => void
  goForward: () => void
  jumpTo: (index: number) => void

================================================================================
CORE FUNCTIONS (superapp)
================================================================================

h(tag: string, props?: Record<string, any> | null, ...rawChildren: any[]): VNode
  Create a virtual DOM element. Props support: class (string | array | object),
  className, style (string | object), onXxx event handlers, ref, key.

text(value: string | number | boolean): VNode
  Create a text VNode.

memo<P>(component: MemoView<P>, props: P): VNode
  Memoized component. Skips re-render if props are shallowly equal.

lazy<T>(view: (data: T) => VNode, data: T): VNode
  Lazy evaluation. Same as memo but takes a view function and data.

app<S, Msg>(config: AppConfig<S, Msg>): AppInstance<S, Msg>
  Mount an application. Starts the TEA cycle.

noFx<S>(state: S): readonly [S, Cmd<any>]
  Return state with no effects. Equivalent to [state, []].

withFx<S, Msg>(state: S, ...effects: Effect<Msg>[]): readonly [S, Cmd<Msg>]
  Return state with effects. Equivalent to [state, effects].

batch<Msg>(commands: readonly Cmd<Msg>[]): Cmd<Msg>
  Merge multiple command arrays into one.

none: Cmd<any>
  Empty command array constant [].

mapEffect<A, B>(effect: Effect<A>, fn: (a: A) => B): Effect<B>
  Transform an effect's message type from A to B.

mapSub<A, B>(sub: Sub<A>, fn: (a: A) => B): Sub<B>
  Transform a subscription's message type from A to B. Passes through falsy subs.

mapDispatch<A, B>(dispatch: Dispatch<B>, fn: (a: A) => B): Dispatch<A>
  Create a child dispatch that maps messages from A to B.

batchSubs<Msg>(...args: (Sub<Msg> | Sub<Msg>[])[]): Sub<Msg>[]
  Merge subscriptions from multiple sources. Filters out falsy values.

resolveClass(value: unknown): string
  Resolve class values. Accepts string, array (falsy filtered), or object (truthy keys).

================================================================================
EFFECTS (superapp/fx)
================================================================================

http<Msg>(props: { url: string, options?: RequestInit, expect?: "json" | "text", onOk: (data: any) => Msg, onError: (error: string) => Msg }): Effect<Msg>
  HTTP fetch effect. Default expect is "json". Non-2xx responses trigger onError with "HTTP {status}".

delay<Msg>(ms: number, msg: Msg): Effect<Msg>
  Dispatch msg after ms milliseconds.

navigate<Msg>(url: string, replace?: boolean): Effect<Msg>
  Push or replace browser history. Dispatches popstate event.

storageSet<Msg>(key: string, value: string): Effect<Msg>
  Write to localStorage. Silently catches quota errors.

storageGet<Msg>(key: string, onResult: (value: string | null) => Msg): Effect<Msg>
  Read from localStorage. Dispatches result message.

log<Msg>(...args: any[]): Effect<Msg>
  Console.log as an effect.

dispatchMsg<Msg>(msg: Msg): Effect<Msg>
  Dispatch a message as an effect. Useful in batched effect lists.

compactEffects<Msg>(...effects: (Effect<Msg> | false | null | undefined)[]): Effect<Msg>[]
  Filter out falsy effects. Use with spread in withFx.

================================================================================
SUBSCRIPTIONS (superapp/subs)
================================================================================

interval<Msg>(ms: number, msg: Msg | ((now: number) => Msg)): Sub<Msg>
  Recurring timer. msg can be a static value or function receiving Date.now().

onKeyDown<Msg>(msg: (key: string, e: KeyboardEvent) => Msg): Sub<Msg>
  Global keydown listener.

onKeyUp<Msg>(msg: (key: string, e: KeyboardEvent) => Msg): Sub<Msg>
  Global keyup listener.

onMouseMove<Msg>(msg: (x: number, y: number) => Msg): Sub<Msg>
  Global mousemove. Receives clientX, clientY.

onResize<Msg>(msg: (w: number, h: number) => Msg): Sub<Msg>
  Window resize. Receives innerWidth, innerHeight.

onUrlChange<Msg>(msg: (url: URL) => Msg): Sub<Msg>
  Popstate listener. Not needed if using routerApp (it handles this).

onAnimationFrame<Msg>(msg: (timestamp: number) => Msg): Sub<Msg>
  requestAnimationFrame loop. Receives DOMHighResTimeStamp.

onEvent<Msg>(event: string, msg: (e: Event) => Msg, target?: EventTarget): Sub<Msg>
  Generic DOM event listener. Default target is window.

websocket<Msg>(props: { url: string, protocols?: string | string[], onMessage: (data: any) => Msg, onOpen?: () => Msg, onClose?: () => Msg, onError?: (e: Event) => Msg }): Sub<Msg>
  WebSocket subscription. Auto-connects when active, disconnects when removed.

================================================================================
ROUTER (superapp/router)
================================================================================

--- URL PARSERS ---

Parser<T>: { _tag: "path", parse: (raw: string) => T | null }
QueryParser<T>: { _tag: "query", parse: (raw: string | null) => T }

str: Parser<string>           — Any string segment
int: Parser<number>           — Integer segment
float: Parser<number>         — Finite number segment
oneOf<T>(values: readonly T[]): Parser<T>  — One of fixed string values

q.str(fallback: string): QueryParser<string>
q.int(fallback: number): QueryParser<number>
q.float(fallback: number): QueryParser<number>
q.bool(fallback: boolean): QueryParser<boolean>
q.optional.str(): QueryParser<string | undefined>
q.optional.int(): QueryParser<number | undefined>

--- ROUTE DEFINITION ---

RouteDef<Params>:
  pattern: string
  parse(pathname: string, search?: string): Params | null
  toUrl(params: Params): string

route(path: string): RouteDef<{}>
route<Spec>(path: string, spec: Spec): RouteDef<ExtractParams<Spec>>

Route pattern syntax:
  "/users"          — Static segment
  "/users/:id"      — Dynamic segment (use spec to type it)
  "/docs/*"         — Wildcard (captures rest as "*" key)
  ":param" names must match keys in the spec object

Examples:
  route("/")
  route("/users/:id", { id: str })
  route("/posts/:id", { id: int })
  route("/search", { q: q.str(""), page: q.int(1) })
  route("/users/:id/posts", { id: int, page: q.int(1) })

--- PAGE PROTOCOL ---

PageConfig<Model, Msg, Shared, Params>:
  init(params: Params, shared: Shared): Model | [Model, Cmd<Msg>]
  update(model: Model, msg: Msg, shared: Shared): Model | [Model, Cmd<Msg>]
  view(model: Model, shared: Shared, dispatch: Dispatch<Msg>): VNode
  subscriptions?(model: Model, shared: Shared): Sub<Msg>[]
  save?(model: Model): unknown
  load?(saved: unknown, params: Params, shared: Shared): Model | [Model, Cmd<Msg>]

Type parameters:
  Model  — Page-local state
  Msg    — Page-local message type
  Shared — App-wide shared state (read from router)
  Params — URL parameters from route parser

Lifecycle:
  Navigate to page → init (or load if cache exists)
  User interaction  → update
  Render           → view
  Events           → subscriptions
  Navigate away    → save (caches model)
  Return to page   → load (restores from cache)

--- PAGE BINDING ---

PageRoute<Shared>: binding of RouteDef + PageConfig + optional guard

page<Model, Msg, Shared, Params>(
  routeDef: RouteDef<Params>,
  config: PageConfig<Model, Msg, Shared, Params>,
  options?: { guard?: (params: Params, shared: Shared) => true | string }
): PageRoute<Shared>

Guard: return true to allow, or a URL string to redirect.
Guards chain up to 5 levels deep to prevent infinite loops.

--- ROUTER ---

RouterModel<Shared>:
  shared: Shared
  url: URL
  _page: { key: string, model: unknown, routeIdx: number, params: unknown } | null
  _cache: Map<string, unknown>

RouterMsg<Shared>:
  | { tag: "@@router/UrlChanged", url: URL }
  | { tag: "@@router/PageMsg", msg: unknown }
  | { tag: "@@router/UpdateShared", fn: (s: Shared) => Shared }

createRouter<Shared>(config: {
  routes: PageRoute<Shared>[],
  shared: Shared,
  notFound?: PageConfig<any, any, Shared, { path: string }>
}): Router<Shared>

Router<Shared> interface:
  init(url?: URL): RouterModel<Shared> | [RouterModel<Shared>, Cmd<RouterMsg<Shared>>]
  update(model, msg): RouterModel<Shared> | [RouterModel<Shared>, Cmd<RouterMsg<Shared>>]
  view(model, dispatch): VNode
  subscriptions(model): Sub<RouterMsg<Shared>>[]
  listen(): Sub<RouterMsg<Shared>>         — popstate subscription
  navigate(url, replace?): Effect<RouterMsg<Shared>>
  updateShared(fn: (s: Shared) => Shared): RouterMsg<Shared>
  href(routeDef, params): string           — generate URL from route

--- routerApp ---

routerApp<Shared>(config: {
  router: Router<Shared>,
  layout: (content: VNode, shared: Shared, dispatch: Dispatch<RouterMsg<Shared>>) => VNode,
  node: HTMLElement,
  debug?: boolean | DebugConfig
}): AppInstance<{ router: RouterModel<Shared> }, RouterMsg<Shared>>

Zero-boilerplate convenience. Wires router init/update/view/subscriptions into app().

--- routerLink ---

routerLink(url: string): { href: string, onClick: (e: MouseEvent) => void }
  SPA navigation helper. Spread onto <a> elements.
  Respects Ctrl/Meta/Shift clicks (opens new tab).
  Uses pushState + popstate event.

================================================================================
DEBUGGER (superapp/debugger)
================================================================================

DebuggerConfig:
  position?: "bottom-right" | "bottom-left" | "top-right" | "top-left"
  collapsed?: boolean
  width?: string

attachDebugger<S, Msg>(instance: AppInstance<S, Msg>, config?: DebuggerConfig): { destroy: () => void }
  Attach a floating overlay with state inspection and time-travel controls.
  Requires debug mode enabled on the app instance (debug: true or { history: true }).

================================================================================
JSX RUNTIME (superapp/jsx-runtime)
================================================================================

tsconfig.json:
  "jsx": "react-jsx"
  "jsxImportSource": "superapp"

jsx(tag: string, props: Record<string, any> | null): VNode
jsxs — alias for jsx
jsxDEV — alias for jsx
Fragment({ children?: any }): VNode — renders children with empty tag

================================================================================
COMMON PATTERNS
================================================================================

--- Basic TEA app ---
import { app, h, type Dispatch } from "superapp";
interface State { count: number }
type Msg = { tag: "Inc" } | { tag: "Dec" };
const init: State = { count: 0 };
function update(state: State, msg: Msg): State {
  switch (msg.tag) {
    case "Inc": return { ...state, count: state.count + 1 };
    case "Dec": return { ...state, count: state.count - 1 };
  }
}
function view(state: State, dispatch: Dispatch<Msg>) {
  return h("div", {},
    h("button", { onClick: () => dispatch({ tag: "Dec" }) }, "-"),
    h("span", {}, String(state.count)),
    h("button", { onClick: () => dispatch({ tag: "Inc" }) }, "+"),
  );
}
app({ init, update, view, node: document.getElementById("app")! });

--- Effects in update ---
function update(state: State, msg: Msg) {
  switch (msg.tag) {
    case "Save":
      return withFx(state, storageSet("data", JSON.stringify(state)));
    case "Load":
      return withFx(state, storageGet("data", (raw) => ({ tag: "Loaded", raw })));
    case "FetchData":
      return withFx({ ...state, loading: true },
        http({ url: "/api/data", onOk: (d) => ({ tag: "GotData", d }), onError: (e) => ({ tag: "Err", e }) }),
      );
  }
}

--- Conditional subscriptions ---
function subscriptions(state: State): Sub<Msg>[] {
  return [
    state.auto && interval(1000, { tag: "Tick" }),
    onKeyDown((key) => ({ tag: "Key", key })),
  ];
}

--- Init with effects ---
const init: [State, Cmd<Msg>] = [
  { items: [], loading: true },
  [http({ url: "/api/items", onOk: (d) => ({ tag: "Got", d }), onError: (e) => ({ tag: "Err", e }) })],
];

--- Nested TEA composition ---
// Child module exports: State, Msg, init, update, view, subscriptions
// Parent wraps with mapDispatch, mapEffect, mapSub
type ParentMsg = { tag: "Child"; msg: Child.Msg };
// View: Child.view(state.child, mapDispatch(dispatch, (m) => ({ tag: "Child", msg: m })))
// Update: map child result with mapEffect
// Subs: Child.subscriptions(state.child).map(s => mapSub(s, (m) => ({ tag: "Child", msg: m })))

--- Router page with fetch ---
export const page: PageConfig<Model, Msg, Shared, { id: number }> = {
  init: (params) => [
    { id: params.id, data: null, loading: true },
    [http({ url: `/api/items/${params.id}`, onOk: (d) => ({ tag: "Got", d }), onError: (e) => ({ tag: "Err", e }) })],
  ],
  update: (model, msg) => { /* handle Got, Err */ },
  view: (model, shared, dispatch) => { /* render */ },
  save: (model) => model,
  load: (saved) => saved as Model,
};

--- Page with guard ---
page(route("/admin"), adminPage, {
  guard: (params, shared) => shared.isLoggedIn ? true : "/login",
})

--- Keyed list rendering ---
h("ul", {},
  ...state.items.map(item =>
    h("li", { key: item.id }, item.name)
  ),
)

--- Class prop variants ---
h("div", { class: "foo bar" })
h("div", { class: ["foo", condition && "bar"] })
h("div", { class: { foo: true, bar: isActive } })

--- Custom effect ---
function myEffectFx<Msg>(dispatch: Dispatch<Msg>, props: { onDone: (result: string) => Msg }): void {
  someAsyncWork().then((result) => dispatch(props.onDone(result)));
}
export function myEffect<Msg>(onDone: (result: string) => Msg): Effect<Msg> {
  return [myEffectFx, { onDone }];
}

--- Custom subscription ---
function mySub<Msg>(dispatch: Dispatch<Msg>, props: { msg: (data: string) => Msg }): () => void {
  const handler = (e: SomeEvent) => dispatch(props.msg(e.data));
  someTarget.addEventListener("someevent", handler);
  return () => someTarget.removeEventListener("someevent", handler);
}
export function onMyEvent<Msg>(msg: (data: string) => Msg): Sub<Msg> {
  return [mySub, { msg }];
}

================================================================================
CLI COMMANDS
================================================================================

superapp new <name> [--jsx]
  Scaffold new project. Generates: index.html, package.json, tsconfig.json,
  vite.config.ts, src/main.ts, src/shared.ts, src/app.css, src/pages/{Home,About,NotFound}.ts,
  src/generated/router.ts. With --jsx generates .tsx files.

superapp add <pattern> [--jsx]
  Add a page file to src/pages/ and auto-run gen.
  Pattern syntax:
    "About"              → src/pages/About.ts, route: /about
    "Home"               → src/pages/Home.ts, route: /
    "NotFound"           → src/pages/NotFound.ts, 404 handler
    "users/[id]"         → src/pages/users/[id].ts, route: /users/:id (string)
    "users/[id:int]"     → src/pages/users/[id:int].ts, route: /users/:id (integer)
    "users/[id]/Edit"    → src/pages/users/[id]/Edit.ts, route: /users/:id/edit
    "Blog/Index"         → src/pages/Blog/Index.ts, route: /blog

superapp gen
  Scan src/pages/, generate src/generated/router.ts.
  Sorts: static before dynamic, more segments first, alphabetical tiebreak.

superapp dev
  Run gen, then start Vite dev server (npx vite).

superapp build
  Run gen, then run Vite production build (npx vite build).

================================================================================
FILE CONVENTIONS FOR PAGES
================================================================================

Directory: src/pages/
Each file must export: export const page: PageConfig<Model, Msg, Shared, Params>

File naming → route mapping:
  Home.ts           → /
  About.ts          → /about
  NotFound.ts       → 404 handler (not a route)
  UserProfile.ts    → /user-profile (CamelCase → kebab-case)
  Blog/Index.ts     → /blog (Index maps to parent)
  users/[id].ts     → /users/:id (string param)
  users/[id:int].ts → /users/:id (integer param)
  [slug].ts         → /:slug

Import name generation:
  Home.ts           → Home
  users/[id].ts     → UsersId
  users/[id]/Edit   → UsersIdEdit

Generated router imports from "../shared" expecting:
  export interface Shared { ... }
  export const initialShared: Shared = { ... }

================================================================================
COMMON MISTAKES AND FIXES
================================================================================

MISTAKE: Mutating state directly
  state.count += 1;  // WRONG — state is frozen in debug mode
FIX: Always return new objects
  return { ...state, count: state.count + 1 };

MISTAKE: Returning effects without state
  return delay(500, { tag: "Tick" });
FIX: Use withFx to pair state with effects
  return withFx(state, delay(500, { tag: "Tick" }));

MISTAKE: Forgetting to convert numbers to strings in h()
  h("span", {}, state.count);  // count is number, renders as VNode child fine
NOTE: Actually this works — h() auto-converts numbers to text nodes.

MISTAKE: Using navigate() from superapp/fx and expecting router to pick it up without popstate
NOTE: navigate() already dispatches a popstate event. This just works.

MISTAKE: Not spreading routerLink
  h("a", { routerLink("/about") })  // WRONG
FIX: Spread the result
  h("a", { ...routerLink("/about") })

MISTAKE: Subscription position instability
  Changing the ORDER of subscriptions in the array causes teardown/restart.
FIX: Keep subscriptions in a stable order. Use falsy values for inactive ones
  (e.g., false && interval(...)) so the array positions stay consistent.

MISTAKE: Using onUrlChange with routerApp
  routerApp already listens for URL changes via router.listen().
FIX: Only use onUrlChange for manual (non-routerApp) setups.

MISTAKE: Editing src/generated/router.ts manually
  It will be overwritten by gen.
FIX: Edit page files in src/pages/ and run superapp gen.

MISTAKE: Page file doesn't export "page"
  export default { init, update, view };  // WRONG
FIX: Use named export
  export const page: PageConfig<...> = { init, update, view };

MISTAKE: Passing raw Msg objects as subscriptions
  [{ tag: "Tick" }]  // WRONG — this is not a Sub
FIX: Use subscription creators that return [SubFn, props] tuples
  [interval(1000, { tag: "Tick" })]

MISTAKE: Guard returning false instead of redirect URL
  guard: (params, shared) => shared.isAdmin  // returns boolean
FIX: Return true or a URL string
  guard: (params, shared) => shared.isAdmin ? true : "/login"

MISTAKE: Infinite guard redirect loop
  Page A guards to B, B guards to A
FIX: Guards chain up to 5 levels max, then falls through to notFound.
  Design guard logic to avoid cycles.
